scripts.test:visual:dist: npm run test:visual:dist:static && npm run test:visual:dist:interaction && npm run test:visual:dist:motion
scripts.test:visual:dist:static: playwright test tests/visual/pharosville.spec.ts --config=playwright.dist.config.ts --grep "desktop canvas shell|dense visual|stressed ship|named risk water|narrow fallback|short desktop fallback|desktop gate|resizing below|ultrawide"
scripts.test:visual:dist:interaction: playwright test tests/visual/pharosville.spec.ts --config=playwright.dist.config.ts --grep "canvas interactions|reduced motion keeps|live reduced-motion"
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm test && npm run test:guard-scripts && npm run check:committed-secrets && npm run check:doc-paths-and-scripts && npm run check:pharosville-assets && npm run check:pharosville-colors && npm run build
scripts.validate:release: npm run validate && npm run test:visual:dist
